title: tetaris capitata
intro: Tetaris capitata, also known as Tetras capitata or False chamomile, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tetaris capitata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
